# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  environmentName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    metadata:
      description: Environment name for resource naming and configuration

  appName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Base name for all resources
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 20

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure region for all resources

  appServicePlanSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S1
    allowedValues:
      - F1
      - B1
      - B2
      - S1
      - S2
      - P1v3
      - P2v3
    metadata:
      description: SKU for the App Service Plan

  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login name
    minLength: 1

  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password
    minLength: 12

  sqlDatabaseSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S0
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: SKU for the SQL Database

  storageAccountSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_LRS
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_LRS
      - Standard_GRS
      - Standard_ZRS
      - Standard_RAGRS
    metadata:
      description: SKU for the Storage Account

variables:
  uniqueSuffix: "[uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'))]"
  appServicePlanName: "[concat('asp-', parameters('appName'), '-', parameters('environmentName'))]"
  webAppName: "[concat('app-', parameters('appName'), '-', parameters('environmentName'), '-', variables('uniqueSuffix'))]"
  sqlServerName: "[concat('sql-', parameters('appName'), '-', parameters('environmentName'), '-', variables('uniqueSuffix'))]"
  sqlDatabaseName: "[concat('sqldb-', parameters('appName'), '-', parameters('environmentName'))]"
  storageAccountName: "[concat('st', replace(parameters('appName'), '-', ''), take(variables('uniqueSuffix'), 8))]"
  storageConnectionStringPrefix: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', variables('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=')]"

resources:
  # ---- Storage Account ----
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('storageAccountSku')]"
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: true
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices

  # ---- Blob Service and default container ----
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/app-data')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/uploads')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None

  # ---- SQL Server ----
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: '2023-05-01-preview'
    name: "[variables('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      version: '12.0'
      minimalTlsVersion: '1.2'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled

  # ---- SQL Server Firewall Rule: Allow Azure Services ----
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: '2023-05-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  # ---- SQL Database ----
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: '2023-05-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSku')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  # ---- SQL Database Connection Policy ----
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: '2023-05-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  # ---- App Service Plan ----
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]"
    kind: app
    properties:
      reserved: false

  # ---- Web App ----
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[variables('webAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
    kind: app
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      siteConfig:
        minTlsVersion: '1.2'
        ftpsState: Disabled
        http20Enabled: true
        alwaysOn: "[if(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'F1'), false(), true())]"
        use32BitWorkerProcess: false
        netFrameworkVersion: v8.0
        connectionStrings:
          - name: DefaultConnection
            connectionString: "[concat('Server=tcp:', variables('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Database=', variables('sqlDatabaseName'), ';User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';Encrypt=true;TrustServerCertificate=false;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
            type: SQLAzure
          - name: StorageConnection
            connectionString: "[concat(variables('storageConnectionStringPrefix'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
            type: Custom
        appSettings:
          - name: WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE
            value: '1'
          - name: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT
            value: "[if(equals(parameters('environmentName'), 'prod'), 'Production', if(equals(parameters('environmentName'), 'staging'), 'Staging', 'Development'))]"
          - name: StorageAccount__BlobEndpoint
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
          - name: StorageAccount__AccountName
            value: "[variables('storageAccountName')]"

  # ---- Web App Slot for staging (non-F1 plans only) ----
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites/slots
    apiVersion: '2023-01-01'
    name: "[concat(variables('webAppName'), '/staging')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environmentName')]"
      application: "[parameters('appName')]"
      managedBy: arm-template
      slotType: staging
    condition: "[not(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'F1'))]"
    kind: app
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName'))]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      siteConfig:
        minTlsVersion: '1.2'
        ftpsState: Disabled
        http20Enabled: true
        alwaysOn: "[if(or(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'F1'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'B1')), false(), true())]"
        use32BitWorkerProcess: false
        netFrameworkVersion: v8.0
        appSettings:
          - name: WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE
            value: '1'
          - name: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT
            value: Staging

outputs:
  webAppName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('webAppName')]"

  webAppDefaultHostName:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName')), '2023-01-01').defaultHostName]"

  webAppUrl:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName')), '2023-01-01').defaultHostName)]"

  webAppPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"

  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2023-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('sqlServerName')]"

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('sqlDatabaseName')]"

  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('storageAccountName')]"

  storageBlobEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"

  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"

  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceGroup().name]"
